codeReview.summary: This fix commit correctly resolves the two blocking harness bugs from `tuistory-mitmproxy-harness` (startup-leak cleanup coverage in `conftest.py` and forced-close default failure semantics in `driver.py` with explicit opt-in in harness-only scenarios), but it does not address the remaining blocking failure from `scenario-invariants-and-regression`.

issues.description: The prior blocking scrutiny failure for `scenario-invariants-and-regression` remains unresolved by this fix commit: `assert_no_setup_processes` still only checks for `uv run cc-sentiment setup` under the scenario home root and does not assert mitmdump/tuistory/temp-home descendant cleanup. Commit `60438bb` changes only `conftest.py`, `driver.py`, and `test_harness.py`, so this contract gap from the prior review persists.

summary: Fix is partially successful: harness startup cleanup and forced-close semantics are corrected, but the blocking per-scenario orphan-scope assertion gap from the invariants feature was not fixed in this commit, so overall status is fail.
